name: AFTER FLY
headline: AFTER FLY organizer profile
description: AFTER FLY is an Indore organizer candidate discovered through public event evidence. The current draft should remain website-only until an admin reviews identity, surfaces, cadence, and owner-safe copy.
sourceSummary: A public Luma event page connects AFTER FLY to an Indore run-and-rave event in March 2025 and embedded event data lists Instagram handle afterfly.in.
fitNotes: This profile was promoted from organizer intake after manual admin review.
Events remain market-filtered under one canonical organizer identity.
Claiming unlocks owner-managed copy, official media, Catch events, and verified reviews.
missingEvidence: Whether every discovered Afterfly surface belongs to this organizer

name: Bhag Club
headline: Bhag Club organizer profile
description: Bhag Club appears to be a running community and brand with public web and event-platform evidence. The entity should be represented once, with city-filtered events, rather than duplicated into separate city logins.
sourceSummary: The official Bhag site and a Luma event page provide evidence for running programming, but the city-specific public listing still needs admin review.
